author: Jdthomas24
description: Advanced Hubitat battery monitoring with analytics, trends and replacement tracking. Recurring scan schedule, confidence-weighted health, EWMA smoothing.
releaseNotes: v2.4.14 - Main page UI cleanup. Status now shown directly in section headers (device count, snooze state, notifications on/off). App Display Name moved to bottom and collapsed by default. Report buttons are now compact.
